description: Style Note Add glamour to your simple ensemble with this stylish maroon wallet from baggit. With multiple compartments and a beautiful design, this wallet is a must-have in your accessories collection. Carry it to social get-together with friends and look trendy. Product Details Maroon wallet with a magnetic button closure Top stitch detail on the front with a buckle Has one main compartment Two insert pockets and one coin holder on the left side Three card holders and two insert pockets on the right side Branding on the back and one zippered pocket Material and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustSize Height: 10 cm  Width: 13 cm Depth: 2 cm
